name: FEDERAL REALTY INVESTMENT TRUST
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, operates, and develops retail and mixed-use properties across the United States. Its portfolio includes shopping centers, mixed-use communities, and retail properties in markets such as California, Maryland, Virginia, New Jersey, Arizona, and Florida, operated through numerous subsidiaries and joint ventures.
